brand.name: CareerVerse
brand.archetype: Premium Ed-Tech / High-Contrast Swiss + Computational Calm
brand.vibe: Professional, premium, uncluttered, forward-looking, student-friendly but mature

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Bento Grid for Complex Data, Optical Alignment

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform duration-200 font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: bg-surface_secondary text-text_primary hover:bg-border transition-colors duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center
buttons.ai_action: bg-accent_ai/10 text-accent_ai border border-accent_ai/20 hover:bg-accent_ai hover:text-white transition-all duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(45,212,191,0.2)] flex items-center justify-center

cards.career_card: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-surface border border-border p-6 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg flex flex-col gap-4
cards.bento_item: flex flex-col rounded-2xl bg-surface border border-border p-6 h-full shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

badges.default: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold bg-surface_secondary text-text_secondary
badges.ai_insight: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold bg-accent_ai/10 text-accent_ai border border-accent_ai/20

components.inputs: w-full rounded-xl border border-border bg-surface px-4 py-3 text-text_primary focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent_ai/50 transition-all placeholder:text-text_secondary/60

media.description: Modern student engaged in study. Use for hero sections or landing page visual anchors. Requires gradient overlay for text readability.
Abstract glass blocks. Perfect for AI Mentor, Career DNA Test, or tech-forward feature backgrounds.
Yellow directional path on the road. Conceptual placeholder for Stream Explorer or Roadmaps section.

accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: All interactive elements must feature clear focus rings (e.g., focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-2).
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets WCAG AA standards. Pay special attention to AI accent teal/coral on light/dark backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All buttons, links, and forms MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted in kebab-case reflecting the role (e.g., data-testid='explore-streams-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Load fonts from Google Fonts: 'Outfit' (weights 400,600,700) for Headings, 'Plus Jakarta Sans' (weights 400,500,600) for Body.
Set up Tailwind CSS variables mapping to the provided light/dark colors. Use 'dark:' variant extensively.

Build the Design System Showcase landing page at the root route ('/'). This page must explicitly render the typography scale, color palette swatches, button variants, badge styles, inputs, and example bento cards.
Include a global Navbar with 'CareerVerse' branding and a Light/Dark toggle. Ensure it uses the 'glass' surface style on scroll.
Construct reusable components (Career Cards, Stream Cards) strictly following the specified border_radius and surfaces_and_shadows guidelines.
Implement lucide-react for all icon needs, keeping stroke width consistent (default 2px) and size mapped to text hierarchy.
Never substitute provided media URLs with dummy placehold.it generators. Use the actual Unsplash URLs provided in the media section.
Ensure the entire app foundation prioritizes generous whitespace (p-6, gap-8) over dense, cluttered lists, matching the 'Premium Ed-Tech' directive.
